evals.prompt: Create an invoice for client Acme Corp. Number INV-2026-042, my company is DevStudio, address 100 Main Street, San Francisco. Two items: Frontend development, 80 hours at $50, and UX Design, 20 hours at $75. Due by May 1, 2026. Save to the current folder.
evals.expected_output: PDF invoice with correct calculations ($5,500 total), two line items, due date May 1 2026
expectations: A PDF file is generated in the outputs directory
Invoice total equals $5,500 (80×50 + 20×75)
Contains two line items: Frontend development and UX Design
Shows DevStudio with address 100 Main Street, San Francisco
Shows due date 2026-05-01

evals.prompt: Generate an act of completed works. Contractor: TechCo Solutions LLC, customer: Digital Service LLC, representative Sarah Chen Services: website development 1 unit at $3,000, technical support 10 hours at $80/hr. Date: April 3, 2026, city: San Francisco.
evals.expected_output: PDF act with services table totaling $3,800, both parties, signature blocks
expectations: A PDF file is generated
Contains both parties: TechCo Solutions LLC and Digital Service LLC
Services table with two rows
Includes date April 3, 2026 and city San Francisco

evals.prompt: Create a proposal for migrating Acme Corp's infrastructure to AWS. We're CloudShift Solutions. Include an executive summary, the migration plan in 3 phases over 12 weeks, and pricing: assessment $15,000, migration $85,000, post-migration support $20,000.
evals.expected_output: DOCX proposal with cover page, executive summary, 3-phase timeline, pricing table totaling $120,000
expectations: A DOCX file is generated
Contains a 3-phase migration timeline spanning 12 weeks
Includes pricing items totaling $120,000
Includes an executive summary section
Identifies CloudShift Solutions as author and Acme Corp as recipient

evals.prompt: Generate a Q1 2026 Performance Analysis report for NovaTech. Author: Data Analytics Team. Findings: revenue grew 23% to $4.2M, customer churn dropped to 3.1%, new product line contributed 18% of revenue. Recommendations: expand into EU market, increase R&D budget by 15%.
evals.expected_output: DOCX report with cover, findings section with metrics, conclusions, and recommendations
expectations: A DOCX file is generated
Contains findings with revenue $4.2M and 23% growth
Contains recommendation to expand into EU market
Identifies NovaTech and Data Analytics Team
Has introduction, findings, and conclusions sections

evals.prompt: Make a presentation for our product launch — "Nexus AI Platform". Company: Synthex Labs. 6 slides: title, agenda, problem (enterprises waste 40% of time on manual data processing), solution (our AI platform), key features (3 bullet points), and a contact slide with hello@synthex.io.
evals.expected_output: PPTX presentation with 6 slides covering the product launch
expectations: A PPTX file is generated
Contains approximately 6 slides
Title slide mentions Nexus AI Platform and Synthex Labs
Problem slide mentions 40% time wasted on manual data processing
Contact slide includes hello@synthex.io

evals.prompt: Draft a service agreement between TechForge LLC (provider) and BrightPath Inc (client). Scope: custom software development and maintenance. Payment: $25,000/month, net-30 terms. Duration: 12 months with auto-renewal. Include confidentiality and IP assignment clauses.
evals.expected_output: DOCX contract with parties, scope, payment, duration, confidentiality, and IP clauses
expectations: A DOCX file is generated
Identifies TechForge LLC and BrightPath Inc as parties
Contains payment terms $25,000/month with net-30
Duration clause specifies 12 months with auto-renewal
Includes confidentiality and IP assignment clauses
